title: Formal follow-up request
subtitle: Ask again politely when you need an answer.
duolingoBridge: B1 Hi moves from controlled B1 into native-style but accessible French: short articles, real conversations, nuanced opinions, and longer connected output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: refer to a previous message.
Knowledge point 2: be clear without sounding aggressive.

sections.title: Native-level tools for B1
rows: je me permets de revenir vers vous
I am getting back to you

items.fr: Je me permets de revenir vers vous concernant ma demande d’inscription.
items.en: I am getting back to you regarding my registration request.
items.es: Me permito volver a contactarle con respecto a mi solicitud de inscripción.

items.fr: Sauf erreur de ma part, je n’ai pas encore reçu de confirmation.
items.en: Unless I am mistaken, I have not yet received confirmation.
items.es: Salvo error por mi parte, todavía no he recibido confirmación.

items.fr: Je comprends que vous ayez beaucoup de demandes en ce moment.
items.en: I understand that you have many requests at the moment.
items.es: Entiendo que tenga muchas solicitudes en este momento.

items.fr: Cependant, j’aurais besoin de cette information avant vendredi.
items.en: However, I would need this information before Friday.
items.es: Sin embargo, necesitaría esta información antes del viernes.

items.fr: Je vous remercie par avance pour votre retour.
items.en: Thank you in advance for your reply.
items.es: Le agradezco de antemano su respuesta.
